title: LumyMon
description: Craft maps to locate rare structures & gyms across every dimension, and collect unique legendary items to power up your Cobblemon experience!
body:
![LumyMon Logo Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77af302e05efb5456afb9b022f7646d6bdfdeb91.png)
## **LumyMon: Forge Your Path to Legendary Adventures**

**LumyMon** is a utility and content expansion designed to enhance the exploration and progression of your Cobblemon journey. It introduces dedicated systems to locate structures, track legendaries, and improve daily gameplay through quality-of-life features!

---

### **🗺️ Navigation & Exploration**
Forget aimless wandering! **LumyMon** adds specialized tools to help you navigate your world with purpose:

* **Regional Cartography Tables:** Use these workstations to craft precise maps
* **Gym & League Mapping:** Forge unique items representing Gym Leaders and Champions (from Kanto to Sinnoh, and beyond!) to generate maps leading straight to their Gyms and Elite Four locations
* **Regional Poké Radars:** Combine rare **Locator Chips** with our custom Cartography Tables to track the exact positions of Legendary Pokémon across every region, from Kanto to Paldea
* **Regi Ores & Resources:** Discover unique ores to awaken the Titans, and use **Apricorn Boxes** for organized, handy storage on the go

---

### **✨ The Altar System**
The mod features a special summoning system for **Legendary and Mythical Pokémon** in Minecraft:

* **Altars and Shrines:** Custom 3D blocks for Legendaries from **Generations 1 through 4**, plus others such as **Eternatus, Regieleki, and Regidrago**
* **Summoning Mechanics:** Use specific items on the altars to trigger encounters, complete with custom particle and sound effects
* **Unique Dimensions:** Venture into custom-built dimensions, like the ones for **Arceus** and **Darkrai**, featuring unique mechanics and atmospheric challenges
* **The Hunt for Perfection:** Every summoned Pokémon has randomized IVs and levels. Will you be lucky enough for a **Shiny** or a **Perfect IV** encounter?

---

### **🛠️ Quality of Life & Mechanics**
Several features are included to streamline the Cobblemon experience:

* **Remote PC Access:** Access your Pokémon Boxes from anywhere _(Default: "**P**")_
* **Better Riding:** A dedicated hotkey allows you to dismount from your Pokémon instantly _(Default: "**V**")_
* **Elemental Mounts:** Your Pokémon now protects you during travel! Gain **lava and fire immunity** while riding Fire-types, and **infinite water breathing** while riding Water-type Pokémon
* **Vanilla Replacements:** Experience a more immersive world as some vanilla mobs are replaced by Pokémon counterparts (e.g., **Happy Ghastlings** becoming **Gastly**, or the **Creaking** becoming **Trevenant**)
* **Optimized Performance:** Built with compatibility in mind, featuring integration with many mods available in **COBBLEVERSE**

---

### **🤝 Perfect Synergy with [COBBLEVERSE](https://poke.lumy.fun)**
While LumyMon works as a standalone expansion, it is the beating heart of the **COBBLEVERSE** modpack. It has been meticulously balanced to provide a progression-focused experience where every craft and every battle feels rewarding.

---

### **🚀 The Journey Continues**
**LumyMon** is a passion project in constant evolution. We are committed to polishing and improving every aspect of it, and we have much more planned for future updates, including new mechanics, expanded content, and deeper integration with your Cobblemon experience.

Join our community on **[Discord](https://discord.lumy.fun)**, share your feedback, and help us build the ultimate Pokémon adventure!

![LumyMon Blocks and Items - Beta 0.6.3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QAX8WiBc/images/0ce22de152556cafa90bcb6e21d96cfa248a8934.png)

_While we're continually learning and growing in programming and texture creation, your patience and understanding as we improve are incredibly appreciated. Thank you!_ ❤️💙
